name: pathfinder-artifacts-mcp
description: Artifacts MCP Server for Pathfinder job search copilot

scripts.build: npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:zod --external:@xenova/transformers --external:vectordb && npx esbuild src/bridge-standalone.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/bridge-standalone.js --external:@anthropic-ai/sdk --external:@modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external:zod --external:@xenova/transformers --external:vectordb

author: Pathfinder Team
